opportunities.title: Product-Led Summit Sydney – Call for Speakers
opportunities.deadline: Not specified (rolling application via 'Apply to be a speaker')
opportunities.fit_reason: A B2B-focused Sydney summit actively inviting speaker applications, ideal for a trust-based sales coach to speak on aligning product, sales and customer trust in the buying journey.

opportunities.title: Sales Enablement Summit Sydney
opportunities.deadline: Not specified – contact organizers to pitch a session
opportunities.fit_reason: A senior sales enablement audience of APAC leaders (e.g., Adobe, Oracle, REA Group) gathering to discuss coaching and pipeline performance, a natural stage for trust-based selling frameworks.

opportunities.title: OutBound Sales Training & Leadership Conference 2026
opportunities.organization: OutBound Conference, Inc. (founded by Jeb Blount)
opportunities.date: November 10-12, 2026 (Main Event), November 12 (Leadership Summit), Las Vegas, NV
opportunities.deadline: Contact organizers directly for speaking/breakout opportunities
opportunities.fit_reason: Billed as the world's premier sales training and leadership conference founded by Jeb Blount, drawing sales trainers and leadership experts, a high-visibility venue for a trust-based sales leadership voice.

opportunities.title: Digital Summit – Apply to Speak
opportunities.date: Multiple 2026 dates across Chicago, Dallas, Denver, Minneapolis, Philadelphia, Raleigh, Tampa, Atlanta
opportunities.fit_reason: A recurring multi-city business/marketing conference series with an open speaker application, suitable for sessions on trust-based B2B sales culture and buyer psychology.

opportunities.title: Marketing Conferences Seeking Speakers
opportunities.date: Various 2026 conferences (e.g., In-House Agency, Digital & Social Media)
opportunities.fit_reason: ANA runs numerous national industry conferences attended by marketing and sales leaders, and explicitly invites session proposals from consultants and experts on a rolling basis.

opportunities.title: Call for Speakers for Seramount Events
opportunities.fit_reason: An open, rolling call for speakers at corporate leadership and culture-focused events, a good match for content on building trust-based, high-performing sales culture.

opportunities.title: Australian Institute of Sales – Events Calendar
opportunities.date: Ongoing FY2026 events (e.g., Digital Day Out, Modern Account Manager Conference)
opportunities.deadline: Contact AIS directly to propose a session
opportunities.fit_reason: AIS runs an ongoing calendar of B2B sales professional development events across Australian cities and states it is still securing speakers, offering a direct route to pitch a trust-based selling session.

opportunities.title: Sales 3.0 Conference Series
opportunities.date: Multiple 2026 virtual dates (e.g., June 24-25, Sept 2-4 AI Sales Summit, Dec 2-4 Training & Enablement Summit)
opportunities.deadline: Contact organizers to pitch a session
opportunities.fit_reason: A long-running virtual sales leadership and enablement conference series whose speaker lineup mixes sales VPs, CEOs, and management experts, a strong fit for trust-based sales culture content.

opportunities.title: Selling Trust Podcast
opportunities.fit_reason: This podcast is explicitly built around building relationships and trust in sales rather than pressure tactics, making it a near-perfect thematic match for a trust-based sales coach guest.

opportunities.title: Sales Strategy & Enablement Podcast (formerly RevOps/Sales Enablement Podcast)
opportunities.fit_reason: With over 1,000 episodes featuring top CROs, CSOs and sales leaders discussing sales psychology and enablement, it's a high-reach show well suited to a trust-based B2B sales culture guest.

opportunities.title: Let's Talk Sales Podcast
opportunities.fit_reason: Focused on Human Behavior Sales techniques and building buyer trust rather than 'lazy selling,' this show's themes align directly with a trust-based selling coaching philosophy.
